title: Werewolves
description: Rise as Werewolf. An addon for Vampirism
body:
# Werewolves

![](https://i.ibb.co/ZVCYD1k/werewolves-title.png)

## Mod Description

As werewolf you rule the night and bring fear to the people.

Instead of becoming a hunter or vampire you can get bitten by a werewolf to be cursed as werewolf.  This allows you transform into beast forms.

## Dependencies
 
This is an addon mod for ![](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism) adding a new faction

### Incompatibilities

- When Epic Fight Mod is installed the werewolf form is not shown


## Development

This mod is Open Source. The code can be found on GitHub under LGPL-3 license

It is actively developed by cheaterpaul as much as spare time permits.
